name: 11" Carved Ceramic Planter Pot Macadamia Tan - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Showcase your favorite plants in this Carved Ceramic Planter Pot from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of ceramic in a macadamia tan hue with a reactive glaze finish, this planter pot brings rustic charm to your interiors. Plus, the round planter boasts a faceted design for a modern look and comes with a single drainage hole to remove excess water.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
